answer:
Your Last Cholesterol Reading
Your most recent cholesterol panel from April 5, 2026 shows:

Total Cholesterol: 237 mg/dL (elevated)
LDL: 162 mg/dL (elevated — the "bad" cholesterol)
HDL: 38 mg/dL (low — the "good" cholesterol)
Triglycerides: 186 mg/dL (elevated)

These results suggest increased cardiovascular risk. You were referred to a cardiologist on April 5 because of these lipids, your blood pressure, and family history. It's important to follow up on that referral.

Your Surgery
Your records show a laparoscopic appendectomy on September 15, 2025 at Riverside General Hospital for acute uncomplicated appendicitis. The surgery was successful.
Your notes also mention recent surgery on May 2, 2026, but the details aren't specified in your records. If you've had another procedure recently, check with Dr. K Madhuri or your hospital for specifics.

Not medical advice — talk to your doctor before acting on this.
